name: HTS_ICAL_FEEDS
description: Stores the employee calendar feed preferences, along with feed security properties, rate limiting settings etc.

columns.Name: ICAL_FEED_ID
columns.Comments: Application-generated primary key

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the feed is active

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the person associated with the feed

columns.Name: SALT
columns.Comments: Base64-encoded 128-bit randomly generated value used to enhance the security of person id and expiration time

columns.Name: TOKEN
columns.Comments: URL encoded security token generated when creating the feed

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_TIME
columns.Comments: Feed or URL expiration time

columns.Name: RANGE_LEFT_EXTENT
columns.Comments: Number of pastweeks to consider relative to the request instant

columns.Name: RANGE_RIGHT_EXTENT
columns.Comments: Number of future weeks to consider relative the the request instant

columns.Name: INCL_SHIFTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Boolean indicating if the calendar content contains events corresponding to schedule shifts

columns.Name: INCL_ABSENCES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Boolean indicating if the calendar content contains events denoting absences intersecting the datarange

columns.Name: INCL_PUBLIC_HOLIDAYS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Boolean indicating if the calendar content contains public holidays

columns.Name: FIXED_WINDOW_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start time for the current fixed time window

columns.Name: FIXED_WINDOW_END_TIME
columns.Comments: End time for the current fixed time window

columns.Name: ACCESS_COUNT
columns.Comments: Counter used to limit access within the fixed window

columns.Name: LAST_ACCESS_TIME
columns.Comments: When the most recent access to the ical feed was requested

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise id or Business group id to identify in a multi tenant system

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

indexes.Columns: PERSON_ID, CASE WHEN "ACTIVE_FLAG" = 'Y' OR "ACTIVE_FLAG" IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE TO_CHAR("ICAL_FEED_ID") END
